---
pagetitle: "Barbra Kiziku Otiende | Home"
title: "Barbra Kiziku Otiende"
image: www/profpic.jpeg
about: 
  template: jolla
  links: 
  - text: LinkedIn
    icon: linkedin
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/barbra-kiziku/"
  
  - text: GitHub
    icon: github
    url: "https://github.com/barbarakiziku-ai"
    
  - text: Email
    icon: envelop-fill
    url: "barbarakiziku@gmail.com"
comments: false
---

about
